name: safehub
description: Scans OpenClaw skills for malware and security issues before you install them. Uses Semgrep and Docker sandbox for static and dynamic analysis.
author: safehub

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan a skill by name, path, or GitHub URL for security issues

commands.name: report
commands.description: Show the last scan report for a skill without rescanning

commands.name: update
commands.description: Pull the latest Semgrep scanner rules from the SafeHub repo
